title: Declaration of policy
doc_html:
PART II. CO-OPERATIVE MARKETING ASSOCIATIONS

§121. Declaration of policy

            The purpose of this Part is to promote, foster, and encourage the intelligent and orderly marketing of agricultural products through co-operation.

            Acts 2017, No. 65, §1.
doc_text:
PART II.  CO-OPERATIVE MARKETING ASSOCIATIONS
§121.  Declaration of policy
The purpose of this Part is to promote, foster, and encourage the intelligent and
orderly marketing of agricultural products through co-operation.
Acts 2017, No. 65, §1.
